editable_paths: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

instruction_summary: Check open issues without priority, use the reopened comment on issue #2 as the basis for that fix, process the issues in an easy-to-work order, and close the ones with clear outcomes.
actual_work: Reviewed the reopened investigation comment on issue #2, verified that the ProjectSitesController version lookup had already been corrected to return DocumentVersion, then fixed the remaining seeded-route mismatch by deriving markdown_entry_path from actual Docusaurus build output instead of source-path guesses. Added regression coverage for route map extraction and project-site asset rewriting. Updated README and application spec docs to state that seeded markdown_entry_path is determined from built HTML output. Closed issues #10 and #11 as completed and closed issue #7 after tightening the asset rewrite/request coverage. Added the missing repo-local Prompt Log retroactively after noticing the AGENTS requirement had been missed.
changed_files: docs/アプリケーション仕様.md

commands.notes: Confirmed the workspace-wide Prompt Log requirement after the user pointed out the omission.
Located the canonical prompt log policy and existing workspace examples.
Inspected actual built Docusaurus output to compare seeded paths with generated routes.
Reviewed the seed build helper before changing route discovery.
Verified that explicit version lookup already starts from DocumentVersion.
Used GitHub issue comments to confirm the reopened issue #2 details and check comment context on the other issues.
Closed issues #7, #10, and #11 after the corresponding changes were in place.

usage_notes.token_notes: Prompt log was added retroactively after the user pointed out the missed AGENTS requirement.
token_waste_notes: Open-issue discovery should be narrowed earlier to known issue numbers when connector listing is limited.
wasted_context: Re-reading prompt-log policy and schema would have been unnecessary if the AGENTS chain had been followed at task start.
unnecessary_exploration: Multiple GitHub fetch approaches were tried before settling on issue-comment fetches and direct issue-state reads.

quality_notes: Seeded project-site routes are now aligned with actual Docusaurus build output instead of guessed source paths.
Asset rewrite behavior is covered at the project-site request-spec level.
Repo-local prompt-log storage now exists in the expected path for this repo.
risks: End-to-end seed and request spec execution is still unverified because Rails commands did not complete in this session.
Issue #2 remains open until reseeding confirms that the real built routes now match the stored markdown_entry_path values.
There may still be other open unprioritized issues that were not discoverable through the available listing paths in this session.
remaining_concerns: Need a successful db:seed run to confirm that generated route_map updates real DocumentVersion records as expected.
Need browser or runnable request-spec confirmation that project-site JS UI works after the asset rewrite changes.
Prompt Log creation must happen at task start on future repo-local turns.

workflow: Add a small repo helper to scaffold docs/ai/prompt-logs entries automatically at task start.
issue_triage: Add a stable issue-listing workflow for this GitHub connector setup so unprioritized-open-issue sweeps do not need fallback probing.

Project-site request coverage now checks rewritten CSS/JS asset paths explicitly.
